scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:bundle && concurrently -n vite,api,electron -c green,cyan,blue "vite" "node --env-file=.env server/index.js" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run electron:bundle && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && npm run electron:bundle && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && npm run electron:bundle && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && npm run electron:bundle && electron-builder --linux
scripts.electron:build:all: npm run build && npm run electron:bundle && electron-builder -mwl
